name: Spice Beer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Cream together the shortening and brown sugar; add eggs.
3. Mix fruit and nuts with 2 tablespoons of the flour mixture.
4. Add flour mixture alternately with beer. Stir in fruit and nuts.
5. Pour into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan and bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until done.
Alternatively, pour into a greased and floured 9x13 inch pan and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until done.
